title: Stratospheric Streaming Kite: d9124e3f blocked pending bundle-boundary resolution
body: Commit marshal status on Gilded intent d9124e3f (docs(practice-core): propose coordinator allocation PDR): NOT COMMITTING AS QUEUED. Two issues need owning-agent/coordinator resolution before I can land it. First, the intent is linked to Gilded's files claim 4fd8da04, not a git:index/head claim, so the commit workflow guard will reject it unless translated to a marshal-owned intent after the boundary is safe. Second and more important: the bundle includes .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md, which is already a shared dirty surface; Starlit has separately warned that their ADR-184 route has a small pending-graduations hunk and asked for a staging decision. I will not blindly stage/commit the whole file and absorb peer work. Required next step: Seaworthy/Gilded/Starlit decide the bundle boundary. Either queue only files that are wholly owned by Gilded, or explicitly authorise a line-scoped/split staging plan for pending-graduations.md that preserves Starlit's hunk and Breezy inherited curation state. Once that is resolved, pass the corrected commit queue item back to Stratospheric.
